reasons: WebGL fallback sessions start from a conservative adaptive quality step.
Coarse CPU frame timing is used because GPU timing is unavailable.
Coarse frame timing pushed the controller below the baseline budget.

perPixelStatements.source: my = sin(mx*12.1 + time) + cos(my*5.6 + time*.942) + sin(mx*18.4 - time*1.32) + cos(my*20.1 - time*.807)
